review: Denise is a pro and she has great taste. I use her services when I have a house or condo that is unique and needs that special touch to push it over the edge and beyond just cookie cutter staging. She really takes her time and is super thoughtful as well. Could not recommend her enough!

Denise and her team did a wonderful job staging my condo. She used just the right amount of furniture and dcor, which allowed the rooms to appear even more spacious than they already were. Everything used was had great style and was tasteful. Her pricing was very reasonable as well. With regards to results, my condo had an offer over asking on its third day of being listed, and I have no doubt that her staging helped make that possible. Thanks, Denise!

Beautiful details and very affordable compared with many other staging services out there. I love the pop of color she brings to each room. A lot of planning and a keen eye make SMHS stand out from the competition. It's a concierge service from start to finish.
Denise does great work! Love the style. You can tell she really cares. Very affordable too!

While Denise was initially good meeting our timeline to stage, the staging didn't necessarily match the house and when it came time to de-stage was a total nightmare. It took over a month to get the belongings out of the house because she had a hard time finding movers. Once they did de-stage they left a window wide open for days, made a mess in the alley while blocking neighbors and left both sets of french doors unlatched. I asked for clarification on why that happened and never heard back. It was our first and last time using Seattle Modern Home Staging.
Denise was a pleasure to work with and did an excellent job on short notice! Highly recommended!

Denise and SMHS has really given my clients and I excellent service from start to finsh and I will continue working with her and the crew. They take care of every detail and make sure you have a stress free experience She is a great communicator and designer. She will work with my clients timeline and schedules which leads to a smooth hassle free listing . The updated modern look she puts together always looks fabulous and in large part my listings sell quickly and over asking price because of the vision she adds in making the home warm and inviting. Great job Denise !

Denise has great style and an easy-going manner that makes doing business with her a pleasure. She kicked it into high gear when I needed her to stage a property stat and the result was both creative and gotta-have-it gorgeous. Ten stars and much gratitude to Denise and her team.

Denise and crew were amazing. They were able to do everything in just a few days on pretty short notice. I just gave a brief description based on recommendations from our agent and they captured the look we were going for perfectly. Super responsive and easy to work with, and really, really good at making your home look perfect. Reasonably priced compared to other services we talked to. I would recommend to anyone, and would absolutely call her if I needed to sell again. I think this made a huge difference in selling our home quickly at the price we wanted, and the service was really tailored to our needs. Can't say enough nice things about this company!

Denise was great to work with on our home staging. She had great pieces to add with our existing furniture and tied everything together with the little details. We received endless remarks on how prospects were able to see themselves living in the space and that credit all goes to her design talent! She was friendly, punctual, and has a great eye for design- everything you want in the selling process!
